import React from 'react'; import './CartPanel.css'; function CartPanel({ isOpen, onClose, cart, onRemove, onUpdateQty, onClear, onExport, onSubmitRequest, user }) { const now = new Date(); const monthLabel = `${now.getMonth() + 1}/${now.getFullYear()}`; const total = cart.reduce((sum, c) => sum + (c.price || 0) * c.qty, 0); return ( <>

{c.sp}

)) )}

)}
); } export default CartPanel;
